The '''''Adversary''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in service to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], operational during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Most of its operational history is unknown, save for its presence at the [[Drydock/Legends|drydock]] station at [[Heriston]] at one point during the time between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], where it underwent routine maintenance and repairs.<ref name="RES" />
